rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding to subcomponent ports or implementation-level state.
Place input/output contracts in component type scope only when using visible features and concrete, named bounds.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component hierarchy: type annexes for interface contracts, implementation annexes for internal bindings.
Ensure AGREE declarations use only scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'bool' not 'boolean', 'int' not 'integer', 'real' not 'float' in AGREE declarations.
Link guarantees to visible ports; avoid subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
anti_patterns: Do not convert Boolean ports to numeric comparisons unless AADL defines them as scalar types.
Do not reference implementation-private subcomponents in component type annexes.
